results.classification_reason: API receives tags=[] but returns ["qa_tag_1,qa_tag_2"] — original value not cleared. Array concatenated into single string. Confirms user-reported bug.
results.actionable: Backend bug: POST /api/ad/:id with tags=[] should clear the array, not preserve/concatenate previous value.

results.classification_reason: categories field cleared correctly after sending categories=[].
createMedia helper returns 404 {} — media creation not accessible with current token/environment.
results.actionable: Verify BASE_URL and API_TOKEN have write access to /api/media. Re-run when environment is stable.

results.classification_reason: Same root cause as TC_MED_POST_update_clear_description — createMedia returns 404.
results.actionable: Re-run when media endpoint is accessible.

results.classification_reason: Show create returns non-200 when description is included in create payload. Test flow is wrong: cannot create+set+clear in one step. Fix: create (name only) → update (set description) → update (clear) → GET verify.
results.actionable: Fix test to use 3-step flow. Not a backend bug.

results.classification_reason: After POST /api/category/:id with description='', GET still returns original description. Field not cleared. Same pattern as Ad tags bug.
results.actionable: Backend bug: POST /api/category/:id with description='' should clear the field.

bugs_confirmed.description: Sending tags=[] does not clear the tags array. API concatenates previous tags into a single string element.
Sending description='' does not clear the description field. GET returns original value unchanged.
